description_long: This is a large wooden half-pipe skate ramp, commonly found in urban parks or recreational areas. The ramp features smooth, curved surfaces for skating, with sturdy metal railings along the top edges for safety. The exterior is decorated with bold graffiti art and colorful stickers, adding a vibrant, urban aesthetic. The structure is constructed primarily from laminated wood panels, supported by a robust internal frame, and reinforced with metal railings and brackets. The ramp is open at both ends, allowing skaters to enter from either side, and the flat platform at the top provides a resting or launching area. The overall design is functional, durable, and visually engaging, catering to skateboarders, BMX riders, and other extreme sports enthusiasts.
description: A large wooden half-pipe skate ramp with metal railings, graffiti art, and open ends for skating. The structure is robust, urban-themed, and designed for extreme sports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the vertical face with graffiti art and a cartoon, as well as the metal railings and the smooth wooden ramp surface.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the full length of the half-pipe, both curved ramps, the central flat section, and the safety railings on both sides.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden face with a sticker, metal railings, and the opposite ramp surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full half-pipe, additional stickers, and the continuous safety railings.
